access_token.description: Supabase access token. Can also be set via the `SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN` environment variable. When both are specified, the provider configuration takes precedence over the environment variable. Generate a token from the [Supabase Dashboard](https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens).

endpoint.description: Supabase API endpoint. Can also be set via the `SUPABASE_API_ENDPOINT` environment variable. If neither is set, defaults to `https://api.supabase.com`. When both are specified, the provider configuration takes precedence over the environment variable.

role.description: Role of the secret JWT template

max_enrolled_factors.description: Maximum number of enrolled MFA factors per user.

max_frequency.description: Minimum interval between MFA challenge requests (seconds).

secret_hashes.description: API-returned hashes for sensitive fields, keyed by API field name. Used for out-of-band drift detection.

single_per_user.description: Allow only one active session per user.

site_url.description: The base URL of the site.

max_frequency.description: Minimum interval between emails sent to the same address (seconds).

create.description: A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).

update.description: A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).

block.description: Auth settings resource for a Supabase project.

checksum.description: SHA256 checksum of the deployed function bundle (remote)

created_at.description: Timestamp when the function was created

entrypoint.description: Path to the function entrypoint file

import_map.description: Path to the import map file

local_checksum.description: SHA256 checksum of local source files before upload

name.description: Name of the function (defaults to slug if not specified)

static_files.description: List of glob patterns for static files to include

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the function was last updated

secret_digests.description: Map of secret name to the SHA-256 hex digest of the secret value. Computed by the provider at plan time (when plaintext values are known) and updated after each apply. Used to detect drift when a secret has been changed outside of Terraform: if the digest returned by the API no longer matches the locally computed digest, the provider marks the affected secret value as null so Terraform will plan an update.

name.description: Name of the secret. Must not start with the `SUPABASE_` prefix — such names are reserved internally by Supabase, cannot be created, updated, or deleted via the API, and are automatically filtered out from reads and imports.

value.description: The plaintext secret value. Stored in Terraform state when managed by Terraform. After an import this field will be `null` because the Supabase API only returns SHA-256 digests — see the Import section below.

secrets.description: Set of secrets for edge functions

block.description: Edge function secrets resource - manages multiple secrets for edge functions

instance_size.description: Desired instance size of the project

legacy_api_keys_enabled.description: Controls whether `anon` and `service_role` JWT-based api keys should be enabled. Please note: these keys are no longer recommended ([more information here](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/api/api-keys#why-are-anon-and-servicerole-jwt-based-keys-no-longer-recommended)).
legacy_api_keys_enabled.deprecation_message: Deprecated. This field will be removed once the transition to publishable and secret keys is complete.

organization_id.description: Organization slug (found in the Supabase dashboard URL or organization settings)

region.description: Region where the project is located

create.description: A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).

update.description: A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).

auth.description:
Auth settings as [serialised JSON](https://api.supabase.com/api/v1#/projects%20config/updateV1AuthConfig).

~> Several fields are returned as a hash by the API rather than plaintext. The provider preserves these fields from prior state, so out-of-band changes will not appear in `terraform plan`.

Affected fields: `smtp_pass`, `sms_twilio_auth_token`, `sms_twilio_verify_auth_token`, `sms_messagebird_access_key`, `sms_textlocal_api_key`, `sms_vonage_api_secret`, `security_captcha_secret`, `external_apple_secret`, `external_azure_secret`, `external_bitbucket_secret`, `external_discord_secret`, `external_facebook_secret`, `external_figma_secret`, `external_github_secret`, `external_gitlab_secret`, `external_google_secret`, `external_kakao_secret`, `external_keycloak_secret`, `external_linkedin_oidc_secret`, `external_notion_secret`, `external_slack_oidc_secret`, `external_slack_secret`, `external_spotify_secret`, `external_twitch_secret`, `external_twitter_secret`, `external_workos_secret`, `external_x_secret`, `external_zoom_secret`, `hook_custom_access_token_secrets`, `hook_mfa_verification_attempt_secrets`, `hook_password_verification_attempt_secrets`, `hook_send_email_secrets`, `hook_send_sms_secrets`.

create.description: A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).

update.description: A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).

anon_key.description: Anonymous API key for the project

publishable_key.description: Publishable API key for the project

secret_keys.description: List of secret API keys for the project

service_role_key.description: Service role API key for the project

url.description: Map of pooler mode to connection string
